message.content:
@startuml
participant "«Android»\nAAOSHAL" as AAOSHAL
participant "«Android»\nAAOSCarAPI" as AAOSCarAPI
participant "AACS_CarControlHandler" as CarControlHandler
participant "AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver" as BroadcastReceiver
participant "AACS_CoreService" as CoreService
participant "AutoSDK" as AutoSDK

AAOSHAL -> AAOSCarAPI : HVAC_FAN_SPEED = (0x0500|SYSTEM|3|SEAT)
AAOSCarAPI -> CarControlHandler : True/Throw Exception
CarControlHandler -> BroadcastReceiver : True/False
BroadcastReceiver -> CoreService : Success/Failure (Intent)
CoreService -> AutoSDK : SetRangeControllerValue Reply (AASB Message)

@enduml
